prompts.text: The three colours shown are "primary colours" — red, yellow and blue. Mixing two makes a "secondary colour".
When a target appears, ask first: "I wonder which two colours will make [target]?" — give them time to think before they touch.
On a correct answer, say together: "[colour A] and [colour B] make [result]!" — say it slowly and let them echo it back.
If they get it wrong, don't tell them — ask: "What could we swap? Should we try a different one?"
